steps.title: Use the contrast word
steps.content: The underlined sentence states a belief held by many scientists: that the ocean floor was mostly flat. The next sentence begins with But, showing that Torres and Chen proved that belief wrong.

steps.title: Reject wrong functions
steps.content: Choice B says the sentence describes an experiment, but the sonar data come later. Choice C invents disagreement between Torres and Chen. Choice D says the sentence presents data, but it presents the belief the data overturn. The answer is A.
